exists(k0: OrderIso[A, C]) { OrderIso.new[A, C](compose[A, B, C](e.map, h.map), compose[C, B, A](h.inv, e.inv)) = Option.some(k0) }
proof: function[T0: PartialOrder, T1: PartialOrder](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T1 -> T0) { not OrderIso.constraint[T0, T1](x0, x1) or exists(k0: OrderIso[T0, T1]) { Option.some[OrderIso[T0, T1]](k0) = OrderIso.new[T0, T1](x0, x1) } }[A, C](compose[A, B, C](e.map, h.map), compose[C, B, A](h.inv, e.inv))

goal: exists(k0: OrderIso[A, C]) { k0.map = compose[A, B, C](e.map, h.map) and k0.inv = compose[C, B, A](h.inv, e.inv) }
proof: function(x0: OrderIso[A, C]) { not (x0.map = compose[A, B, C](e.map, h.map) and x0.inv = compose[C, B, A](h.inv, e.inv)) }(k)
